title: gladiolus bonaespei
intro: Gladiolus bonaespei, also known as the Cape Gladiolus or False Gladiolus, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Iridaceae family. This plant is primarily used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Gladiolus bonaespei include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Gladiolus bonaespei typically involve drying and processing the plant's roots and rhizomes, which can then be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
